name: Apple Filled Oatmeal Crunch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Grease baking sheets with shortening.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the shortening, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla extract. Beat at medium speed of mixer until well-blended.
In another bowl, mix oats, wheat germ, flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
Gradually add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended.
Stir in the chopped pecans.
Form dough into 1-inch balls. Place them 2 inches apart on baking sheets. Flatten slightly by hand.
Bake for 5 to 7 minutes.
Remove from oven and press a center of each cookie with the back of a teaspoon. Fill the indentation with about 1 teaspoon of apple pie filling.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until lightly browned. Do not overbake.
Allow cookies to cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes before transferring them to foil to cool completely.
